name: AlphaX POS Profile Allowed

fields.label: Default
fields.description: When the cashier loads and multiple profiles are eligible, the default is preselected (still asks user to confirm).

description: One row in the 'allowed POS profiles' table on either a Terminal or a User. Defines which POS Profiles can be used at this terminal / by this user. The cashier resolves the active profile by intersecting Terminal.allowed with User.allowed.
